meanings.definition: be pertinent or relevant or applicable
examples: The same laws apply to you!
This theory holds for all irrational numbers
The same rules go for everyone

meanings.definition: give an affirmative reply to; respond favorably to
intend with some possibility of fulfilment
examples: I hope to have finished this work by tomorrow evening

meanings.definition: have a fancy or particular liking or desire for
examples: She fancied a necklace that she had seen in the jeweler's window

meanings.definition: make an attempt at achieving something
